textByHashes.fc83e7f2ee7fbe44ff8ca81c04a95250e740e51c: Protective clothing? I'm afraid I only have the one suit which I made myself to prevent infection from any contaminated patients I treat.
textByHashes.7e621a01cc862e7baa2275160c2879544af75686: I suppose I could sell you this one and make myself another, but it would cost you at least 100 gold so that I could afford a replacement.
textByHashes.6edd047724984f2d12ef2953f7cb01a066bcd01b: That's okay. Just don't go near those sheep. When you can find the money come back here.
textByHashes.c49720b1e685de3aa1ba53c4f01a102f16c40985: These should protect you from infection.
textByHashes.b1100167a0ff0045be24f30446b19ba5caec94a7: You don't seem to have enough room to hold the protective suit. Come back when you do.
textByHashes.c09508bca0633863f2a8a7693995dca1ebd6c30c: I'm afraid it will cost me that much to replace. I cannot possibly sell it for less.
textByHashes.bc758b626d42cf9ad2cd427c40b27c273a4388fc: Did you dispose of those infected sheep yet?
textByHashes.ab63ff36392d1f6d300a7cc39fc3a0793cf0ded6: You should hurry, they could infect the entire town in a matter of a few days!
textByHashes.1caa8f386c36a0f6354143aad4d1571bbead333f: I notice you do not appear to have your protective clothing with you. Would you care to buy some more? Same price as before.
textByHashes.412ddf6e941e2ad28cd63053dc3b8dc157c2f0cf: I suggest you go and retrieve your protective suit then. Trust me, you do not want to be infected.
textByHashes.c09d81b6243f54b96152047e4994365085b8909d: Hello there. Can't stop to talk I'm afraid, I'm very busy right now.
textByHashes.60d49d939bc2b4263c33cadbd271cab1e2fadcdb: Retrain? But that will take months! Who will help the people if there are no doctors around? This is a foolish move!
textByHashes.a3f44325b6cb78ddb2323a78965c29c7ce928df3: Well don't blame me when there's no one to help the king if he falls ill!
textByHashes.34bf84d13719872c634acdc2ee2885c0c61fe998: I don't take orders from citizens. Now I really must get to work.
textByHashes.39f6b2dac96fd67429e789758f5571207838f6c9: How do you feel? No heavy flu, shivers, nausea or loss of appetite?
textByHashes.512653891ff3828cbea72afe69ee67e42cbc3278: How about nightmares then? Are you experiencing any problems with especially scary nightmares?
textByHashes.902e6e0c54d727394e0b58e313c2b20575ecba41: Good, good, I had to make sure. This plague really has an incredibly fast contagion rate. It spreads faster than the common cold!
textByHashes.c29e31c78ac7c23205b593f4e116f5e3c8d11d83: It came from the west somewhere. It is extremely quick spreading, and utterly deadly.
textByHashes.7d02957a503c5e3cf678f23c574774020344010c: It varies slightly from case to case, but usually abnormal nightmares and flu-like symptoms, progressing as you succumb more. Eventually, it results in the presence of a thick black tar-like substance secreted
textByHashes.7eb7f78d92ea5712d64fa67876998b025e5be0e3: Unfortunately if you reach this stage of infection then no one can save you.
textByHashes.44f3aa326dd63ac76d874d72e06c85633ce03fe4: You do that adventurer. You do not want to become infected by the plague.
textByHashes.408add3e7b5b69cdc1439f895fa49f593526db53: Good day, you have my next payment? I don't keep this charade up for fun you know.
textByHashes.a5a54bcb9abae220a6d8d6a50ddc24b119d759da: Well if you would mention it next time you see the Head Mourner, it would be appreciated.
